title: Getting Started
content:
### Three Ways to Add CSS --- ### 1. External CSS (Best Practice) Create a `.css` file and link it in ``: ```html ``` `styles.css`: ```css body { background-color: lightblue; } ``` --- ### 2. Internal CSS (Single Page) ```html ``` --- ### 3. Inline CSS (Specific Element) ```html

Red text

``` --- ### Cascading Order When multiple styles conflict, this order wins: 1. Inline styles (highest priority) 2. Internal styles 3. External styles 4. Browser defaults (lowest priority) --- > **Best Practice:** Use **external CSS** for real projects. Keep style separate from content.
